commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=366925498a0353686fe957974df0f3a141dcb87e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows memory-core session ingestion to primary transcripts, adds cron parentage classification through spawnedBy/parentTrigger for subagents, exports helper predicates, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +132, Tests +168. Total +300 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main uses the shared usage-counted listing for both Dreaming and memory_search, and the PR regression is visible by following that helper into memory session sync and stale-row deletion.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor proof and a maintainer-visible code repair; automation should not take over while the external real-behavior-proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(memory-core): exclude archive transcripts from dreaming corpus and propagate cron parentage to subagents
target.body:
## Summary

Fix two defects in Dreaming session-corpus ingestion that cause cron-heavy deployment corpora to be dominated by automation noise (67%+ archive transcripts):

1. **Archive re-ingestion**: `listSessionFilesForAgent` used `isUsageCountedSessionTranscriptFileName` which includes `.reset.*` / `.deleted.*` archive artifacts, causing every rotated transcript to be re-fed into the dreaming corpus. Changed to `isPrimarySessionTranscriptFileName`.

2. **Cron parentage not propagated to subagents**: `isCronRunSessionKey` only matched the session's own key. Subagent sessions spawned by cron runs (e.g. LCM retrieval navigators) had `agent:main:subagent:*` keys and were never classified as cron-descended. Fix adds three layers:
   - Spawn-time `parentTrigger: "cron"` propagation in `subagent-spawn.ts`
   - `spawnedBy` chain traversal in `session-files.ts` classification
   - Secondary defense in `dreaming-phases.ts` for pre-migration sessions

## Changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/session-files.ts` | Switch to `isPrimarySessionTranscriptFileName` for dreaming; add `spawnedBy` chain walk for cron classification |
| `packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/session-files.test.ts` | Update tests to match new predicate behavior |
| `src/agents/subagent-spawn.ts` | Detect cron parent and store `parentTrigger: "cron"` on spawned children |
| `extensions/memory-core/src/dreaming-phases.ts` | Secondary defense: spawnedBy chain walk at ingestion time |
| `src/config/sessions/types.ts` | Add `parentTrigger?: "cron"` field to `SessionStoreEntry` |
| `packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/openclaw-runtime.ts` | Export `isPrimarySessionTranscriptFileName` |
| `packages/memory-host-sdk/src/host/openclaw-runtime-session.ts` | Re-export for SDK consumers |
| `packages/memory-host-sdk/src/engine-qmd.ts` | Add export mid-plane |
| `src/plugins/session-entry-slot-keys.ts` | Add `parentTrigger` to retained keys |

## Verification

- `pnpm build` ✅
- All 82 tests passed: session-files (12), subagent-spawn (24), dreaming-phases (46)
- Import cycles: clean
- Fix preserves `memory_search` archive indexing (only dreaming corpus path changed)

## Related

- Fixes openclaw/openclaw#90313
- Related: #67272, #68449, #72611 (distinct root causes — see issue for detailed distinction)
